label: Set row fields (template)
description: Set **top-level** row keys from **fieldMap** template strings (literals and `{{variable}}`, same as **Send to endpoint**), and/or **rawCopies** to copy values from dot/bracket paths on the row **without stringifying** (objects/arrays preserved). **rawCopies** run first, then **fieldMap**. Optional **runIf** skips the whole step. **fieldMap** values are always **strings**.

formSchema.label: Raw copies (JSON array of { to, fromPath })
formSchema.hint: Optional. Copy from row path to top-level key before fieldMap. e.g. [{"to":"data","fromPath":"api.response"}]

formSchema.label: Field map (JSON object: key → template string)
